name: [HIGH] CVE-2026-29786
statusMessage: node-tar: hardlink path traversal via drive-relative linkpath
statusTrace: node-tar is a full-featured Tar for Node.js. Prior to version 7.5.10, tar can be tricked into creating a hardlink that points outside the extraction directory by using a drive-relative link target such as C:../target.txt, which enables file overwrite outside cwd during normal tar.x() extraction. This issue has been patched in version 7.5.10.
